title: Define explicit autonomy boundaries for Cursor background agents
Formalise audit hook log schema and add CI self-test
Add MCP server allowlist and prompt-injection guardrails
Enforce structured output schema in /review slash command
Enforce coverage thresholds in CI using @vitest/coverage-v8
Enforce WCAG 2.1 AA contrast and automated axe checks on components
note: Implemented with axe-core called directly via a first-party src/test/axe.ts helper, not jest-axe — this project uses Vitest, and a thin wrapper of uncertain maintenance was avoided per 40-tooling-supply-chain.mdc (prefer extending the existing toolchain).

title: Add prefers-reduced-motion and animation best-practice rules to 31-design.mdc
note: Already satisfied by the Tailwind v4 migration (PR #26) — the 'Motion and animation' section in 31-design.mdc already covers prefers-reduced-motion. No further change needed.

title: Add CSS Cascade Layers architecture guidance to 31-design.mdc
Define and enforce a design token system via tailwind.config.ts
note: Adapted: Tailwind v4 (already adopted in PR #26) is CSS-first and has no tailwind.config.ts. The rule instead requires tokens to be declared as CSS custom properties in src/index.css, which is where this project's token system already lives.

title: Add container query guidance and Tailwind plugin to 31-design.mdc
note: Adapted: Tailwind v4 ships container queries in core, so @tailwindcss/container-queries was not installed — adding it would be a redundant dependency. The rule documents the native @container/@sm:/@md: syntax instead.

title: Generate SLSA provenance attestation for build artefacts
note: Pinned to actions/attest-build-provenance@v4.1.0 (SHA a2bbfa25375fe432b6a289bc6b6cd05ecd0c4c32) instead of the proposed v2 — v2 is superseded and the repo's SHA-pinning convention always tracks the current stable release. The step only runs on push (github.event_name == 'push'), not on pull_request, since a provenance record is only meaningful for the artefact that actually ships and fork PRs cannot obtain the required OIDC token anyway.

title: Add CycloneDX SBOM generation to CI
note: Pinned to @cyclonedx/cyclonedx-npm@5.0.0 instead of the proposed 1.19.3, which no longer exists on the npm registry (superseded by 2.0.0 through 5.0.0 since Jan 2025). Documented the sbom.json artifact location in 40-tooling-supply-chain.mdc.

title: Enforce npm provenance checks and exact pinning for production dependencies
Pin CI container images to digest (SHA256) not just version tag
note: Resolved digests at PR time via the Docker Hub and GHCR registry APIs (semgrep:1.168.0 -> sha256:59fbed61..., gitleaks:v8.30.1 -> sha256:c00b6bd0...). Documented in 40-tooling-supply-chain.mdc that digests must be re-resolved by hand whenever either tag bumps, since Dependabot does not track container digests.
